violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Bar area wiping cloth stored on edge of 3 sink system. All in-use cloths should be stored in the sanitation solution.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Bar wash machine did not have adequate sanitation when tested. -Bar has three sink system, establishment will need to utilize hand washing until dish machine can be serviced.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Bowls in the kitchen stored vertically.--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Daily-use bowl and strainer stored on top of a reach-in cooler. The top of cooler was dusty and above eye site.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Most items were not date marked. i.e. make table items (currently items are not consistently used within 24 hours), open wings, open chopped chicken, etc.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. -Drink cup being used as scoop, left in shredded cheese.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Styrofoam cup being used as scoop, left in Ranch and plastic cup being used as scoop, left in mayo mixture.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -All pizza paddles are visibly soiled, are not being washed regularly.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Bar dishwasher found with 0ppm Chlorine solution. Changed out SparChlor and still found at 0ppm Chlorine. (Chlorine found during wash cycle.) *Directed to sanitize at 3 comp sink or to use kitchen high temp dishwasher until unit is fixed.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
